name: Trading in Securities/Commodities Safe Harbor

eligibility.description: Applies to nonresident aliens and foreign corporations trading for their own account, even if through a U.S. broker or with discretionary authority, provided they are not dealers.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Trading in stocks, securities, or commodities for the taxpayer's own account does not constitute a 'trade or business within the United States,' protecting foreign investors from ECI taxation.
